scripts.dev: FORCE_COLOR=0 concurrently -n backend,frontend "npm run start:dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.dev:light: FORCE_COLOR=0 concurrently -n backend,frontend "npm run start:dev:light -w backend" "npm run dev:light -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test:e2e -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
